title: Durable Long-Running Work and Operations · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Operate a multi-hour or multi-day agent task through interruptions. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a durable runbook and restartable workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate durable orchestration state from ephemeral model turns.
Use scheduled checks or heartbeats only when timing or external state requires them.
Wait or subscribe for expected external changes without classifying unchanged state as failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
